basicDetails.schemeName: Reimbursement of membership Fee in Government promoted E-Commerce Portals

nodalMinistryName.label: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The "Reimbursement of Membership fee of Government-Promoted E-Commerce Portals Scheme" is a sub-scheme under "National Scheduled Caste and Scheduled Tribe Hub (NSSH) Scheme". The component has provision for reimbursement of Annual Membership / Subscription fee of Government promoted e-commerce portals such as GeM, e-khadi, Tribal Cooperative Marketing Development Federation of India (TRIFED), Tribes India, MSME Mart, etc. to SC/ST Micro and Small Enterprises (MSEs).
schemeContent.benefits_md: - **Financial Assistance:** 80% of the membership/subscription fee is reimbursed, up to ₹25,000/- per financial year (excluding applicable taxes), whichever is less.- **Coverage:** Applicable for both new memberships and renewals on eligible e-commerce portals.
schemeContent.briefDescription: Reimbursement of Membership fee of Government promoted e-commerce portals Scheme is a sub scheme under National Scheduled Caste and Scheduled Tribe Hub (NSSH) scheme.

children.text: The "Reimbursement of Membership fee of Government-Promoted E-Commerce Portals Scheme" is a sub-scheme under "National Scheduled Caste and Scheduled Tribe Hub (NSSH) Scheme". The component has provision for reimbursement of Annual Membership / Subscription fee of Government promoted e-commerce portals such as GeM, e-khadi, Tribal Cooperative Marketing Development Federation of India (TRIFED), Tribes India, MSME Mart, etc. to SC/ST Micro and Small Enterprises (MSEs).
80% of the membership/subscription fee is reimbursed, up to ₹25,000/- per financial year (excluding applicable taxes), whichever is less.
Applicable for both new memberships and renewals on eligible e-commerce portals.
The applicant must visit the official portal of the
The applicant must click on the "Scheme name" and then click on “Sign Up” and register using basic details such as name, email ID, and mobile number.
The applicant must create a password and complete the registration process.
The applicant must log in using the registered credentials.
The applicant must fill in the required details and submit the application online.

applicationProcess.process_md: **Step 1:** The applicant must visit the official portal of the [National SC-ST Hub](https://www.scsthub.in/nssh-schemes/). **Step 2:** The applicant must click on the "Scheme name" and then click on “Sign Up” and register using basic details such as name, email ID, and mobile number. **Step 3:** The applicant must create a password and complete the registration process. **Step 4:** The applicant must log in using the registered credentials. **Step 5:** The applicant must fill in the required details and submit the application online.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: - Applicant should belong to Scheduled Caste(SC) / Scheduled Tribe (ST) category. - He/She should represent any Micro and Small Enterprises (MSEs).

children.text: Applicant should belong to Scheduled Caste(SC) / Scheduled Tribe (ST) category.
He/She should represent any Micro and Small Enterprises (MSEs).
